metadata.title: Various Complements
metadata.description: This plugin enables you to complete words like the auto-completion of IDE

regex.source:
Notice(
          `\u26A0 Fail to load ${path} -- Various Complements Plugin -- 
 ${e}`,
          0
        )
regex.target:
Notice(
          `\u26A0 无法加载 ${path} -- Various Complements Plugin -- 
 ${e}`,
          0
        )
Notice("复制各种补足项的设置")

regex.source: name: "Add a word to a custom dictionary"
regex.target: name: "将一个单词添加到自定义词典中"

regex.source: text: "The path to `cedict_ts.u8`. You can download it from "
regex.target: text: " `cedict_ts.u8`的存放路径. 你可以从这里下载它： "

regex.source: text: "\u26A0 `partial` is more than 10 times slower than `prefix`"
regex.target: text: "⚠️ `partial` 比 `prefix` 慢 10 倍以上"

regex.source: text: "'Ctrl a' means pressing the Ctrl key and the A key."
regex.target: text: "'Ctrl a' 表示按下 Ctrl 键和 A 键。"

regex.source: text: "'Enter|Tab' means pressing the Enter key or the Tab key."
regex.target: text: "“Enter|Tab” 意味着按下 Enter 键或 Tab 键。"

regex.source: text: "Use 'Mod' instead of 'Ctrl' on Windows or 'Cmd' on macOS."
regex.target: text: "在 Windows 上使用“Mod”代替“Ctrl”，在 macOS 上使用“Mod”代替“Cmd”。"
.setName("将带变音符号的字母视为字母字符。")

regex.source: .setName("Treat an underscore as a part of a word.")
regex.target: .setName("将下划线视为单词的一部分。")

regex.source: .setName("Max number of words as a phrase")

regex.target: .setName("在输入法编辑模式下禁用建议")
.setName("行模式抑制自动补全的触发")
.setName("短语模式抑制自动补全的触发")

regex.source: .setName("Only complement English on current file complement")

regex.target: .setName("之前：包含捕获组的正则表达式模式")
.setName("要保留的历史记录最大数量")

regex.source: .setName("Show log about performance in a console")
.setDesc(`[\u26A0Warning] It makes slower more than N times (N is set value)`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`[\u26A0警告] 它会使速度降低 N 倍（N 为设定值）`)

regex.source: .setDesc("It doesn't support the inline Math block.")
.setDesc("No focus on the suggestions until the cycle key is pressed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在按下循环键之前不关注任何建议。")

regex.source: .setDesc("It uses a default value of Strategy if set 0.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果设置为 0，则使用默认值 Strategy。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Prefix match path patterns to include files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("前缀匹配路径模式以包含文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Prefix match path patterns to exclude files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("前缀匹配路径模式以排除文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Only load words that match the regular expression pattern.")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅加载匹配正则表达式模式的单词。")
